name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new language feature, stdlib function, or toolchain improvement
labels: enhancement

<!-- Describe the concrete problem you're trying to solve.
     "I want X" is less useful than "when I'm doing Y, I can't do Z without X." -->

<!-- What would you like to see? Include example Tyra code if relevant. -->

     docs/spec/ja/language-spec.md is the authoritative source. -->

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- What workarounds have you tried? Why are they insufficient? -->
